name: Marshmallow Cream Fudge
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Semi-Sweet Chocolate Morsels OR 2 cups Milk Chocolate Morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter in a 9x9x2 inch dish.
2. Heat in microwave on full power for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes or until melted.
3. Blend in sugar and evaporated milk. Mix well.
4. Cook in microwave on Level 8 (medium-high) for 15-17 minutes or until a soft ball stage is reached. Stir mixture frequently during cooking time.
5. Blend in chocolate morsels, marshmallow cream, vanilla, and nuts. Stir until smooth.
6. Chill until firm.
7. Cut into 1-inch squares.
8. Store in an airtight container.
Note: The soft ball stage is when the candy syrup, when dripped into very cold water, forms a firm ball which does not flatten on removal from water.
